descriptions.amazon: Securely connect all your Amazon stores, sales accounts, credit cards, bank accounts, and accounting platforms.
descriptions.core: Securely connect all your sales accounts, credit cards, bank accounts, and accounting platforms.

sidebarBlocks.title: Why do I need to provide connections?
list: Faster Funding: Securely sharing account connections speeds up additional funding requests.
Personalized Support: Helps us plan for your future funding needs with tailored solutions
Flexible Collection: Enables adaptable collection services aligned with your goals.

sidebarBlocks.title: Is it secure to connect my accounts?
list: We use the best security features available like strong customer authentication and regulated Open Banking APIs
Connections are read-only, it’s impossible to control or make changes to your accounts

ConnectionErrorModal.title: How to resolve your connection error
ConnectionErrorModal.content: Try reconnecting this account again. If the problem persists, chat to our support team.
ConnectionErrorModal.contentNoReconnect: Try deleting and connecting this account again. If the problem persists, chat to our support team.
ConnectionErrorModal.contentTroubleshooting: Try reconnecting this account again. If the problem persists, read our troubleshooting guide or chat to our support team.

ConnectionDuplicate.title: This {{platform}} account is already connected
ConnectionDuplicate.subtitle: Looks like you’ve already connected this account with us

ConnectionDelete.title: Are you sure you want to delete this connection?

PlatformInstructionsAmazon.title: Connect Amazon
PlatformInstructionsAmazon.select: Select the marketplace you want to connect. We automatically add all the marketplaces for that region- so for each store, you only need to connect one marketplace per region
PlatformInstructionsAmazon.signIn: Sign in with your Amazon seller credentials
PlatformInstructionsAmazon.tick: Tick the box to grant Uncapped access to your account and data and click Confirm

bankErrors.plaidLinkError: Plaid link connection could not be established please refresh the page.
bankErrors.tokenError: Incorrect Plaid token. Please try again later.
bankErrors.saveError: Bank connection couldn’t be saved. Please try again later.

saltedge.header: Connect bank account with Salt Edge
saltedge.p1: For institutions that require compliance with PSD2 regulations, we partner with Salt Edge Limited to access and retrieve your account information.
saltedge.p2: By using the service, you indicate that you have read and agree with the Salt Edge <0>Terms of Service</0> and <1>Privacy Policy<1>.

yapily.p1: We have partnered with Yapily Connect to access your bank data at {{bank}}
yapily.p2: You will now be securely redirected to {{bank}} to give access to the following information:
yapily.p3: By using the service, you agree to Yapily Connect accessing your bank data, the <0>Terms & Conditions</0> and <1>Privacy Notice</1>. This consent will be valid until {{date}}.

walmart.description: Connect all your Seller Center accounts for each market. You can connect more than one account for each market.

instructions: Click on the <bold>settings icon</bold> and select <bold>API</bold> from the list
Get the credentials from the section <bold>API Keys</bold> or generate a new set by clicking <bold>Generate New API Key</bold>
Paste the matching values on this page
Under <bold>Website</bold> locate the entry <bold>Secret Key</bold> and copy the key shown
Paste the key you’ve just copied in the field on this page

amazon.copy: We automatically add all the marketplaces for your store when you connect to a region

instructions: Copy your Shopify store subdomain and paste it to the form on the left ie. example.myshopify.com
Sign in to your <href> Klarna Portal </href>
Go to <bold>Settings</bold> and click <bold>Generate new Klarna API credentials</bold>
Copy your <bold>Username (UID)</bold> and <bold>Password</bold> or download as a .txt
Check <bold>I’ve saved the credentials on my device</bold> and click <bold>Close</bold>
Enter the saved credentials into the fields on this page

BankAccountCountrySearchableList.noResults: It looks like your bank isn’t supported yet. Please check the spelling or your search term. You can <0>skip bank connections</0> and upload bank statements later but this will slow down your application.
BankAccountCountrySearchableList.noResultsPortal: It looks like your bank isn’t supported yet. Please check the spelling or your search term.
BankAccountCountrySearchableList.noResultsAlternative: It looks like your bank isn’t available through our default connection provider. You can try an alternative provider with a wider range of bank connections.

AmazonRegionCards.choose: Choose if your store is located in:
